do_not_cross: do not enable public validator promotion from this artifact
do not claim public BFT readiness until every required scenario has executable evidence
do not enable live economics or validator payouts
do not enable production helper execution

public_multi_validator_bft.disabled_reason: Public multi-validator BFT requires adversarial convergence, churn, partition/rejoin, equivocation, and restart/replay evidence.
public_multi_validator_bft.truth_boundary: Launch matrix is a conservative guardrail; runtime apply/admission code remains authoritative.

public_validator_promotion.disabled_reason: Public validator promotion requires separate external multi-validator proof and operator readiness gates.
public_validator_promotion.truth_boundary: Launch matrix is a conservative guardrail; runtime apply/admission code remains authoritative.

required_scenarios.minimum_result: same finalized height/hash/root across honest validators
required_scenarios.title: independent multi-process validator finality

required_scenarios.minimum_result: identical roots and no skipped committed blocks
required_scenarios.title: restart/replay preserves state root

required_scenarios.minimum_result: fresh node reaches same root from canonical blocks
required_scenarios.title: lagging/fresh node catches up by verified replay
observer cannot vote, validate, or produce blocks
helper execution cannot become production authority during validator proof
